chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 1/8: Test Equipment
scene: 早上九点会议前，你检查摄像头和麦克风。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 九点的会，你设备测过了吗？
turns.en: Nine o'clock meeting. Did you test your setup?

turns.cn: 刚测，耳机正常，摄像头有点暗。
turns.en: Just did. Headset works, but the camera's a bit dark.

turns.cn: 开个台灯，背景别太乱。
turns.en: Turn on a desk lamp. Keep the background tidy.

turns.cn: 好，我用虚拟背景。
turns.en: Okay. I'll use a virtual background.

turns.cn: 会议链接发你邮箱了。
turns.en: I sent the meeting link to your email.

turns.cn: 收到，提前五分钟进。
turns.en: Got it. I'll join five minutes early.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 2/8: Join the Stand-up
scene: 团队站会开始，主持人点名。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 张伟，昨天进展和今天计划？
turns.en: Zhang Wei, what did you finish yesterday and what's the plan today?

turns.cn: 昨天完成了测试，今天修两个 bug。
turns.en: Finished testing yesterday. Fixing two bugs today.

turns.cn: 有阻碍吗？
turns.en: Any blockers?

turns.cn: 需要设计稿确认，已私信设计师。
turns.en: Need design approval. I messaged the designer.

turns.cn: 好，下午同步一下。
turns.en: Okay. Let's sync this afternoon.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 3/8: Share Your Screen
scene: 你向客户演示方案，需要共享屏幕。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 可以开始演示了吗？
turns.en: Ready to walk us through it?

turns.cn: 好的，我共享屏幕，看得到吗？
turns.en: Sure. Sharing my screen now. Can you see it?

turns.cn: 看到了，请翻到第三页。
turns.en: Yes. Please go to slide three.

turns.cn: 这页是核心功能，加载时间两秒。
turns.en: This slide shows the core feature. Load time is two seconds.

turns.cn: 移动端也支持吗？
turns.en: Does it work on mobile too?

turns.cn: 支持，我切到手机预览。
turns.en: Yes. Let me switch to the mobile preview.

turns.cn: 清楚，继续吧。
turns.en: Clear. Please continue.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 4/8: Fix Audio Issues
scene: 会议中你的麦克风突然没声音。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 张伟，你静音了吗？听不到你。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, are you muted? We can't hear you.

turns.cn: 抱歉，我换一下麦克风。
turns.en: Sorry. Let me switch microphones.

turns.cn: 现在呢？
turns.en: How about now?

turns.cn: 现在能听到吗？
turns.en: Can you hear me now?

turns.cn: 可以了，你接着说。
turns.en: Yes. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 好，我刚才说的是截止日期。
turns.en: Okay. I was saying the deadline is Friday.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 5/8: Breakout Room
scene: 主持人把你们分到小组讨论室。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 咱们组讨论方案 B 对吧？
turns.en: We're discussing option B, right?

turns.cn: 对，我觉得成本更低。
turns.en: Right. I think it's more cost-effective.

turns.cn: 但上线时间要晚两周。
turns.en: But launch would be two weeks later.

turns.cn: 可以分阶段，先上核心功能。
turns.en: We could phase it. Launch core features first.

turns.cn: 好，我记要点，五分钟后汇报。
turns.en: Good. I'll take notes. We report in five minutes.

turns.cn: 你来主讲，我补充技术细节。
turns.en: You present. I'll add the technical details.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 6/8: One-on-One with Boss
scene: 下午你和老板视频一对一。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 最近远程协作还顺利吗？
turns.en: How's remote collaboration going lately?

turns.cn: 总体顺利，有时时差开会比较累。
turns.en: Mostly fine. Time-zone meetings can be tiring.

turns.cn: 有需要支持的吗？
turns.en: Anything you need support with?

turns.cn: 希望减少不必要的会，留时间写代码。
turns.en: Fewer unnecessary meetings would help. More time to code.

turns.cn: 合理，我会注意。继续保持。
turns.en: Fair point. I'll watch that. Keep up the good work.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 7/8: Record the Meeting
scene: 培训会需要录制，你向组织者确认。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 这次培训会要录屏，可以吗？
turns.en: We'll record this training session. Is that okay?

turns.cn: 可以，录完发哪里？
turns.en: Sure. Where will the recording go?

turns.cn: 上传到内网，只有团队能看。
turns.en: Internal site. Team access only.

turns.cn: 好，我关一下通知避免弹窗。
turns.en: Okay. I'll turn off notifications to avoid pop-ups.

turns.cn: 谢谢，开始了。
turns.en: Thanks. Starting now.

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

title: Chain 8/8: Send Meeting Notes
scene: 会议结束，你在群里发纪要。（对话链：远程会议）

turns.cn: 纪要发群了，请确认行动项。
turns.en: Notes are in the chat. Please confirm the action items.

turns.cn: 看到了，我周五前交报告。
turns.en: Got it. I'll submit the report by Friday.

turns.cn: 设计稿周三前定稿对吧？
turns.en: Design finalizes by Wednesday, right?

turns.cn: 对，有问题随时 ping 我。
turns.en: Right. Ping me if anything comes up.

turns.cn: 好，今天辛苦了。
turns.en: Okay. Good work today.

turns.cn: 你也是，明天见。
turns.en: You too. See you tomorrow.
